products.name: GlobeCloud Starter Plan
products.description: Three regional SQLite nodes, geo routing, and grounded copilot for small teams.

products.name: GlobeCloud Pro Plan
products.description: Priority replication, dedicated routing probes, and OpenAI-powered copilot.

products.name: GlobeCloud Enterprise
products.description: Global gateway, custom SLAs, audit logs, and multi-key API access.

knowledge.title: Pricing overview
knowledge.body: GlobeCloud Starter includes 3 regions and 10GB storage. Pro adds dedicated replication and priority routing. Enterprise includes custom SLAs and dedicated support.

knowledge.title: Data residency
knowledge.body: EU customers can pin reads and writes to eu-west-1. Replication to other regions is asynchronous and configurable per tenant.

knowledge.title: Support SLAs
knowledge.body: Enterprise customers receive 15-minute response SLAs during business hours across all regions. Starter and Pro plans use community support with 24-hour response targets.
